Patch release.

## Fixed
- The release date in the bubble is now formatted **DD.MM.YYYY**.

This also carries the v1.0.0 fixes: real version numbers (e.g. `1.7 → 1.8`) via tag-list pagination, the running tag (not the digest hash) as the "from" version, and the DEPRECATED badge for archived upstreams.

## Install / update

Unraid → **Plugins**. If you're coming from a date-versioned test build, **remove ShipLog and reinstall** (a date version looks newer than `1.0.x`, so Unraid won't auto-offer it):

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg
```

After installing, the engine re-polls on start; give it a minute (or `curl -X POST http://localhost:8484/api/refresh`) and hard-refresh the Docker tab.
